title: 这条 prompt 细腻描绘了一个充满未来感和废土美学的场景，适合用于科幻类游戏或影视作品的宣传海报，或者作为高端数码艺术作品展示，能够吸引喜欢赛博朋克和末日题材的观众。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 细腻描绘了一个充满未来感和废土美学的场景，适合用于科幻类游戏或影视作品的宣传海报，或者作为高端数码艺术作品展示，能够吸引喜欢赛博朋克和末日题材的观众。
prompt_original: A mecha girl mid-teens, pale skin smudged with soot and salt spray, sharp amber eyes with glowing HUD reticles, waist-length ash-white hair tied in a high ponytail whipping in the sea wind, matte gunmetal exoskeleton armor plating her shoulders, forearms and shins, exposed hydraulic pistons at the joints, chest rig with glowing cyan coolant lines, oversized oil-stained hangar jacket half slipping off one shoulder, a massive rail cannon resting on her right shoulder, dog tags and frayed red ribbon at her collar , standing off-center to the left on the rusted edge of a tilted steel platform jutting out over dark water, weight shifted onto one leg, left hand gripping the cannon strap, head turned slightly toward camera with a quiet defiant stare, steam venting from her back thrusters, her ponytail and jacket streaming sideways in the salt wind , a vast derelict sea-city at dusk, colossal megastructures of unknown purpose rising from the ocean in staggered silhouettes, bone-white monolithic towers fused with barnacled steel, cyclopean ring-shaped constructs canted at broken angles, rusted skeletal gantries threaded with dead cables, dark swells rolling between the pylons, shipwrecks half-swallowed at their feet, thick sea fog clinging to the bases while the upper structures pierce into a bruised sky, scattered faint lights blinking high in the towers like distant eyes , moody low-key lighting, cold teal ambient from the overcast sky, warm amber sodium glow leaking from a distant structure camera-right, hard backlight from a low sun behind the towers carving her silhouette, volumetric god rays cutting through sea mist, wet specular highlights on her armor , 35mm anamorphic lens, slight low angle looking up past her shoulder toward the structures, medium-wide shot, shallow depth of field with foreground rust in soft focus, horizontal lens flares, fine atmospheric haze compressing the distant megastructures into layered silhouettes , cinematic anime key visual, painterly digital illustration with crisp line art, desaturated oceanic palette of teal, bone-white and rust punched by small warm accent lights, film grain, high-contrast editorial poster aesthetic . Format 16:9.
prompt_zh: 一个十几岁的机甲少女，苍白的皮肤上沾着煤烟和盐水，锐利的琥珀色眼睛中带有发光的HUD瞄准器，及腰的灰白色头发高高扎成马尾辫，在海风中飘扬。她的肩膀、前臂和小腿上覆盖着哑光的枪灰色外骨骼装甲，关节处有裸露的液压活塞。胸部装备上有发光的青色冷却管线，一件巨大的油渍机库夹克半挂在一只肩膀上，右肩扛着一门巨大的轨道炮。脖子上挂着身份牌和磨损的红丝带，站在倾斜的钢制平台上，重心偏在一条腿上，左手握着炮带，头微微转向镜头，带着一种安静而坚定的眼神。背上的推进器冒着蒸汽，她的马尾辫和夹克在咸湿的海风中向一侧飘动。背景是一个废弃的海上城市，在黄昏时分显得格外壮观，巨大的未知用途的巨型结构从海面上错落有致地升起，骨白色的巨塔与长满贝类的钢铁融合在一起，独眼巨人般的环形建筑以破碎的角度倾斜着，生锈的骨架式吊架上缠绕着死掉的电缆，暗涌在支柱之间翻滚，船骸半埋在它们脚下，厚重的海雾笼罩着底部，而上部结构刺破了淤青般的天空，塔楼高处散布着微弱的灯光，像远处的眼睛一样闪烁。低沉的色调照明，阴天下的冷蓝绿色环境光，右侧远处的建筑物透出温暖的琥珀色钠光，低垂的太阳从塔楼背后投射出硬朗的背光，雕刻出她的轮廓，体积光穿过海雾，盔甲上反射出湿润的高光。使用35mm变形镜头，轻微的低角度向上看，越过她的肩膀看向结构，中宽镜头，浅景深，前景的锈迹柔和模糊，水平镜头眩光，细腻的大气霾压缩远处的巨型结构成层叠的剪影。具有电影感的动漫关键视觉图，精细线条的数字插画，褪色的海洋调色板由青色、骨白色和锈色组成，点缀着小而温暖的灯光，胶片颗粒，高对比度的编辑海报风格。格式16:9。
